title: cheirolophus santos-abreui
intro: Cheirolophus santos-abreui is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to the island of São Nicolau in Cape Verde. Cheirolophus santos-abreui has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and provide relief from congestion and coughs.
